scripts.build: chant build src --lexicon gcp -o config.yaml && chant build src --lexicon k8s -o k8s.yaml
scripts.install-operator: kubectl apply -f https://github.com/ray-project/kuberay/releases/download/v1.3.0/kuberay-operator.yaml && kubectl -n kuberay-operator wait deploy/kuberay-operator --for=condition=Available --timeout=120s
scripts.status: kubectl -n ray-system get raycluster ray && kubectl -n ray-system get pods -l ray.io/cluster-name=ray
scripts.deploy: npm run build:gcp && npm run deploy-infra && npm run configure-kubectl && npm run install-operator && npm run build:k8s && npm run apply
scripts.teardown: kubectl delete -f k8s.yaml; kubectl delete -f config.yaml
